info.title: uReport API
info.description: uReport CRM REST API — Wave 2a–2d backend surface. All endpoints require JWT authentication via Authorization: Bearer header or ureport_session cookie. Staff/admin roles enforced by RbacMiddleware.

get.summary: List / search tickets (MySQL fallback when Solr unavailable)
Get a single ticket by ID

post.summary: Assign a ticket to a staff person
Post an external response to a reporter

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Source ticket ID to merge away

post.summary: Merge source ticket into target ticket (F18)
post.description: Closes source ticket, sets mergedIntoTicketId, inserts two merged action records (one on source, one on target), and triggers reporter notification. Auth: staff/admin only.

get.description: Returns open, non-merged, non-deleted tickets that are not the source ticket. Used by the MergeDialog UI.

get.summary: Get action history for a ticket
List media attachments for a ticket
Get location data for a ticket
Get geo clusters for map display

post.summary: Bulk assign multiple tickets to a person

get.summary: Activity report — tickets opened/closed over time
Assignments report — tickets per staff member
List contact methods for a person

post.summary: Add a contact method to a person

get.summary: List saved search bookmarks for current user
Get notification settings for current user
OIDC callback — exchange code for session

BearerAuth.description: JWT token in Authorization: Bearer header

CookieAuth.name: ureport_session
CookieAuth.description: Session cookie set after OIDC login

mergedIntoTicketId.description: ID of the target ticket this was merged into

customFields.description: JSON blob of custom field values

Action.description: An immutable audit/action record on a ticket

Person.description: A person in the system (staff, admin, or reporter)

Substatus.description: A custom substatus label for tickets

Template.description: A response template for staff replies

ApiClient.description: An external API client with a secret key

key.description: API secret key — shown only on creation/regeneration

GeoCluster.description: A geographic cluster of tickets for map display

field.description: Field name if field-level error, null for entity-level

ApiEnvelope.description: Standard API response envelope { data, meta, errors }

personId.description: Person to assign; null to unassign

targetTicketId.description: ID of the canonical ticket to merge into

content.description: Response text sent to the reporter

example.message: Cannot merge a ticket into itself
This ticket has already been merged
